title: Vegan Mediterranean Crumble Pie
description: A delicious vegan dessert featuring a crumbly oat topping, sweet caramelized fruit, and a hint of Mediterranean spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together caramelized fruit, Mediterranean spices, and a pinch of pepper (if using).
In a separate bowl, mix together crumble topping ingredients to form a crumbly mixture.
Pour the caramelized fruit mixture into a pie dish and top with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the crumble topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
